title: WKS Record Type
description: An auxiliary structured data type referenced by forms (via the recordtype extension). Part of the WKS Case Configuration Standard. `fields` is a Form.io-style schema and is validated permissively.

_id.description: Storage envelope field. Not part of the logical config contract.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the WKS Case Configuration Standard this document conforms to. Absent/null is treated as the 1.0 baseline.
